caption: Technical diagram showing PostgreSQL hybrid search with central fn_hybrid_search function box receiving three input arrows: Semantic Search using pgvector cosine similarity with vector grid icon in blue, Trigram Search using pg_trgm similarity score with fuzzy text icon in green, Full-Text Search using tsvector tsquery with keyword highlight icon in orange, merging inside function into RRF Reciprocal Rank Fusion outputting single ranked results list
alt_text: Hybrid search diagram with three inputs: blue pgvector semantic, green pg_trgm trigram, and orange tsvector full-text merging through RRF into ranked results
